textByHashes.b60106875e48668fc2a2eaa2cf7b5abc5a3c0851: Welcome to Weiss, troll. I am Mother. Mother sorry about your trouble getting in here.
textByHashes.23449b022eef5fda1698692b01d4b040f60738e9: We not trust humans. Also, your human keep talking about its arm, and we not want mad human in our town. But now Mother knows human is your servant, we let it come and go freely.
textByHashes.ecffb421492b08aabdb43346c8b2fe5169bdae9f: Humans are not welcome in Weiss. If you are not the servant of this troll, you should go away and never return.
textByHashes.3b92669e7c32b0f3e30a23e00ffef06b29a39192: A troll child is named after the first thing they try to eat. This is tradition of troll people. My full name is Mother's Left One.
textByHashes.d29b0f81d2a9beafc04bdc010b4da55f0c8a54a8: This here is Don't Know What, loyal bodyguard and chief sentry. He like a son to Mother.
textByHashes.84a42ec978d2e20deb626059b62dc78254f7d862: This old troll is Odd Mushroom. He is big clever-clogs, and it makes him talk funny, but Mother puts up with it. Odd Mushroom invents stuff for Mother.
textByHashes.b2be591cbb90794412037f0e881b9e8a4204b1bb: And here come Mother's daughter, Snowflake.
textByHashes.3aeb79b17948199e8e74e6e18062dd370d7f43d4: Snowflake! We men got business to talk! Shut up and get out.
textByHashes.848a38f7dffb305b2008c5798513919254c43dde: You shut up too, or Mother break your clever-clogs head open an' see how smart your brain is when it outside your skull!
textByHashes.da4c939320425a69f6f93349ee432d3158973b51: Snowflake got to respect boss, an' that is Mother. When Mother retire as boss, Don't Know What will marry Snowflake. Then he will be boss, an' Snowflake got to respect him.
textByHashes.9fc2dad815d62b02bf324718036f8f38726462b0: This your last warning - shut up! Weiss needs strong boss - that is how we survive. For now, Mother is strongest boss. Some day, Don't Know What will be strongest boss. Otherwise trolls die out.
textByHashes.5ab6faaf81c23f4f428db4448db40bb63860b0f9: So, arm troll, you come from Stronghold to share what you know. What you got?
textByHashes.1ff2dccfe860bba582bfa7821e33dbba912fd870: Farming? That a stupid skill for a man-troll. Proper man-troll should use his muscles. You teach us something better than that, or you get out and not come back!
textByHashes.67b0e49f489bfdccf05fcb717f06634e3f3c8782: Mother is not interested in eating stupid vegetables. Mother likes wolf flesh, freshly killed, with blood running down Mother's jaw.
textByHashes.a3c0cb6c2eb0c7fda0ebcd66f88b65bb9d5ed407: Mother gets real warm fuzzy feeling inside, eating furry wolf.
textByHashes.e3073aa768d674437fd67ce089718d7a914cc9cc: You better have something else to offer, or you go home an' stop wasting Mother's time.
textByHashes.19b4678a445c286e3accb7c4251282d8f16bc26c: Mother has trolls already who chuck rocks really hard. Also Mother has seen birds - they are not scary.
textByHashes.5a7e6741fff0660027532bbd25ff779ced49543d: Mother is not impressed. Have Stronghold trolls nothing else to offer?
textByHashes.795fab5ad0ee93f5ac900d46563f6feb68d33409: Mother is boss; Snowflake will obey her father. Arm troll is making Mother angry. Now, what you teaching us?
textByHashes.285cc59e9bbb98a9373fd9ce1dd8ab600297ccaf: Mother can hear you! It not matter. Mother's daughter, Snowflake, will marry Don't Know What. Then he can be boss when Mother retires.
textByHashes.85de3cc381a36dce11736ea77f02865ae5d992bc: Trolls need strong boss. Mother kept trolls alive through Mother's strength! Otherwise trolls would have died long ago. Once Mother retires, Don't Know What is strongest.
textByHashes.e10ce8b3032c71367a88ce43a714de257313a6ce: So Don't Know What will marry Snowflake and be boss of Weiss. No more talk on this! You arm troll, you teach us something good or go home!
textByHashes.88329ae6e47971b1681dcb3aae9a26b19d960f31: Arm troll is useless. Get out of here!
textByHashes.f81f6eb9349bfacf94c39b9cefc8ca80c1b94f1c: My Arm did this? My Arm killed him?
textByHashes.3403d6514e42d11ea75ae8d41cbd9d466aba7d3f: Huh. Mother must think about that. But look at this body here...
textByHashes.564a1c60f0ab0905959d37cf31159fa29b846a2b: What kind of fight was this? Where is the blood? When Mother kills an enemy, there is blood. Much blood. Blood, brains, gut juices.
textByHashes.d49ff6fb686bffdb47bee0f389f8f77882140ade: This old man could have died of old age in his sleep. How is that revenge for what he did to Mother? And to Mother's people?
textByHashes.b8168cebae16beafda78ca05075d94b57f96c9d8: You shut up, Odd Mushroom! Always talking about moving on, talking about civilising, talking about progress - what kind of troll are you?
textByHashes.83fde0461dee8292ba74fbacf81053e16399de3a: You messed up Mother's daughter - she uses long words like you, talks about leading trolls into future.
textByHashes.4573ff0d7f2cb74ec8bea1ed633539b2b9bf8b99: She needs to marry proper troll, like Don't Know What, and remember how trolls are. Don't Know What can lead tribe for real.
textByHashes.c4c1238105531961358af7c246a97dcf4f908ca8: I am Mother. I am your father, and you will obey me! This Arm troll brings nothing but trouble, and Mother does not trust him. In fact...
textByHashes.8f3d6ad55b5231f469b02a9857055bd159f86b79: ... so you two kill the stupid Arm troll and the human it brought with it. Mother will sort Snowflake out permanently.
textByHashes.debd34d5fac1828a4909013d91cd0efda8295492: You want to do it yourself?
textByHashes.a3fef286df05b5a861d0641bfa6562f9871d835d: Question Mother again, and it will be your blood that Mother drinks instead. Snowflake betrayed her father, and Mother does not forgive.
textByHashes.21e8c6bc9cbce7d211d0831e67218b2e1359b162: Mother does not need you to be happy. Mother requires only that you obey, or die. We are trolls, not softy liberals like Snowflake.
textByHashes.4e94f1a939798116a6757112bccd7be79afee039: Of course he is in the dungeon. Mother put him there.
